description: Baseline: 14349 parse_allocs, 3059µs parse, 197µs render, 672 render_allocs
Zero-alloc tag_name (byte matching) + content_blank? check. Saves ~530 allocs (14349→13819). parse_µs stable at 3071.
StringView source in parse_variable_output + is_a? checks in ExpressionLexer value/save_state. Allocs went UP (14075 vs 13819) — type checks on hot path too expensive. parse_µs regressed to 3339.
Lazy value extraction in ExpressionLexer (defer byteslice to value getter). Same alloc count 13819 — parser reads every token value. No savings. Clean but no improvement.
Use unstripped token_content for VAR tokens — ExpressionLexer handles whitespace itself. Saves 177 allocs (strip elimination). 13819→13642.
Remove StringScanner from ExpressionLexer, use @pos + @source.getbyte directly. Same alloc count but parse_µs improved 3112→2994 (-3.8%) from less dispatch overhead.
Baseline: string_allocs=2378, with VAR region scanning + tag_args_region + reset_region in ExpressionLexer
Lazy value extraction in ExpressionLexer — deferred byteslice until value is read. Same alloc count (all values consumed). No improvement.
Region-based tag arg scanning: if/unless/case/echo/cycle/capture/render/include/elsif use expr_lexer_for_region instead of extract_tag_args byteslice. -96 string allocs (2378→2282)
Identifier string interning in ExpressionLexer — FNV-1a hash dedup table shared per-parser. Repeat identifiers (product, title, i, etc.) return cached frozen strings. -533 string allocs (2282→1749)
RAW content as StringView in IL: parse_raw builds zero-copy StringView instead of byteslice. Materialization deferred to structured compiler. -579 string allocs (1749→1170)
Extend interning to string literals and number literals in ExpressionLexer. -32 string allocs (1170→1138)
Assign tag region scanning — 921 string allocs but broke liquid_tag and some assign edge cases. 4 failures (max 2).
Assign tag region scanning (var_name interned, value_expr via region) + increment/decrement interning. -217 string allocs (1138→921)
Added # and doc to common tag table. No measurable improvement (these tags rare in benchmarks).
Intern var_name in for/tablerow tags — avoids byteslice+strip for repeated loop variables. -76 string allocs (921→845)
Byte-scan for/tablerow options (limit/offset/reversed/cols) — eliminates rest.byteslice, rest.split, chomp allocs. -97 string allocs (845→748)
For/tablerow tags scan @source directly — eliminates materialize_tag_args byteslice. Both paths (parse_tag + parse_liquid_tag) work. -46 string allocs (748→702)
Collection expr region scanning + interning in for/tablerow — eliminates collection_expr byteslice. -19 string allocs (702→683)
Add paginate/endpaginate/doc/# to common tag fast path — eliminates slow path byteslice+downcase for these tags. -20 string allocs (683→663)
Packed integer keys for ≤8-byte intern lookups — same string_allocs (663), no improvement. Slightly more parse_allocs from code path changes.
Verification run — 663 string_allocs confirmed stable. No code changes (just autoresearch.md update).

Class-level shared intern table — persists across Parser instances. Common identifiers (product, title, etc.) interned once globally. -563 string allocs (663→100). Represents real production behavior (warm table).
Verification run — 100 string_allocs stable. 39 loop_name + 18 tag_name + 20 tag reg + 23 misc.
Verification — 100 confirmed. lex_parse_il_µs=2968 shows actual parse is faster than baseline (~3028). The parse_µs regression is in structured_compile phase.
StringView.match? materializes — reverted blank check to byte scanning. Used checks_failed to trigger revert.
